name: greedent
flavor_texts: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.
Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.
text: Greedent is the Greedy Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: cheek-pouch, gluttony (hidden). Base stats — HP: 120, Attack: 95, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 55, Sp. Def: 75, Speed: 20. Evolution line: skwovet → greedent. Lore: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss. Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.
